_comment: Zero Gravity Agent — Dynamic Config. Edit values and restart the server (python main.py). Every field is optional: anything missing falls back to a safe default. You cannot break the agent by editing this file.

vad._comment: Voice Activity Detection. Tune to your room. Lower silence_ms = faster but cuts people off; higher = more patient. max_utterance_ms = if someone talks this long with NO natural pause, the agent auto-segments (interprets that chunk and keeps listening) so a giant single turn never overwhelms the model and goes mute.

timeouts._comment: Mute-bug recovery. interpret_timeout_s = the server-side WATCHDOG: if the agent never starts speaking within this many seconds after the user's turn ends, it plays the pre-recorded 'speak in short phrases' clip and recycles the live session. Gemini is fast (1-3s); 5s catches a true hang without cutting a slow word-lookup.

interpretation._comment: Robustness for long or noise-contaminated utterances. max_retries = silent re-attempts before the agent asks (IN THE SPEAKER'S LANGUAGE) to use short phrases. incoherence_* tune when a muted turn is treated as background-noise/cross-talk contamination (the agent says 'this is the interpreter, I cannot hear you because of background noise') instead of merely too-long. Higher incoherence_min_words = more conservative (ignores minor noise); lower max_stopword_ratio = stricter before flagging noise.

triggers._comment: Extra phrases that activate each role, ON TOP of the built-in detection. Add variants you discover while experimenting. These can only IMPROVE detection — they never disable the built-ins.

vertex._comment: RESEARCHER knowledge base. service_account_file: filename of your JSON key in this folder (leave empty to auto-detect any service_account JSON).
